title: Editor unlocked
description: You can now write simple Python calls with add_score() in your own program.

title: +1 line
description: Increase your program capacity to 3 executable lines so you can chain more add_score() calls.

title: for loop
description: Unlock real Python repetition with for _ in range(n): so automation starts to feel like real code.

title: variables
description: Store values in names like times = 3 and reuse them in your program.

title: if
description: Add conditional branching so your program can make simple decisions.

title: while
description: Unlock while loops once conditions are available and the player is ready for open-ended repetition.

title: functions
description: Define small reusable helpers with def to structure your automation.

title: lists
description: Work with small collections in real Python syntax and prepare for more advanced automation.
